footer_credits: Proudly developed in Istanbul by Turkish engineers with excellence and dedication.
footer_desc: A cross-platform web intelligence and cybersecurity platform.
home_desc: A high-performance OSINT and vulnerability scanning platform built with Rust, Svelte 5, and Tauri. Deep scan domains, APIs, and networks safely and locally.
home_feat1_desc: Powered by the Rust web-analyzer crate. Scans massive lists of domains, IPs, and DNS records concurrently without overwhelming system resources.
home_feat2_desc: Native performance across Linux, macOS (ARM & Intel), and Windows. Run your cybersecurity analysis tools uniformly from any desktop.
home_feat3_desc: Zero external telemetry telemetry. All your OSINT data, scans, and analytical history remain strictly local on your machine.
feat_desc: WebQ integrates an extensive suite of tools for OSINT, vulnerability discovery, and technical intelligence—all wrapped in an obsidian glassmorphic interface.
feat_item1_desc: Perform detailed DNS queries (A, MX, TXT, NS). Discover subdomains, exact geographical locations, and track SSL certificates seamlessly.
feat_item2_desc: Leverage built-in zero-day Nmap integrations alongside powerful REST mapping and GraphQL exploration plugins using highly concurrent asynchronous threads.
feat_item3_desc: Instantly fingerprint CMS implementations (WordPress), uncover server headers, and detect Cloudflare or other active Web Application Firewalls.
feat_item4_desc: Perform regex-based contact discovery for emails and social footprints, while analyzing structural web elements like headings and robots.txt in parallel.
docs_hero_desc: Everything you need to know about setting up and using WebQ.
docs_install_linux: Download the AppImage, make it executable, and run it.
docs_install_macwin: Download the appropriate `.dmg` or `.msi` installer from the Downloads page and follow the setup wizard.
docs_usage_li1: Open WebQ from your application launcher.
docs_usage_li2: Navigate to the Engine Status or Feature Gates tab to ensure components are active.
docs_usage_li3: Enter your target domain or IP into the primary scanner module.
docs_usage_li4: Select your required intelligence vectors (e.g., DNS, WAF Discovery).
docs_usage_li5: Hit Engage and monitor the concurrent stream of data results live.
docs_arch_p1: WebQ leverages Tauri v2 to bridge the gap between a high-performance system-level Rust core (`web-analyzer` crate) and a beautiful Svelte 5 frontend.
docs_arch_p2: The core engine utilizes tokio asynchronous workflows, ensuring the UI remains perfectly fluid even during heavy concurrent HTTP and DNS polling.
dl_hero_desc: Choose your operating system below to get the latest stable version of WebQ (v0.2.1).
dl_sys_req_desc: WebQ runs strictly locally on your machine. Network connection is required to scan remote hosts. Administrator privileges might be required for Nmap integrations.
